backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a social media backend with user profiles, posts, comments, and likes, using access control to restrict write operations to authenticated users while allowing public reads.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (HTML title update, illustration assets, profile editing, post detail screen, navigation) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose of each component, screen, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark modes, used as the design system foundation.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with the page title set to 'Social Spark' and a root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication, manages view routing between Feed, CreatePost, PostDetail, and Profile screens, and shows a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Sign-in/sign-out button component using Internet Identity that clears the React Query cache on logout and handles already-authenticated edge cases.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: First-time profile setup dialog collecting display name and optional bio, saving via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation with loading spinner and error display.
frontend/src/components/feedback/QuerySt: Provides reusable UI feedback components: LoadingState (spinner), ErrorState (error icon), EmptyState (inbox icon with optional content), and PostCardSkeleton for loading placeholders.
frontend/src/components/layout/SocialLay: Main layout wrapper for the social app featuring a sticky header with navigation, a centered main content area, a bottom navigation bar, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/nav/SocialNav.ts: Bottom navigation bar with Feed, Post, and Profile tabs, highlighting the active view and treating post-detail as part of the Feed tab.
frontend/src/components/posts/CommentFor: Form component for submitting a comment on a post, using a textarea with a 500-character limit and displaying pending/error states via the useAddComment mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/posts/CommentLis: Renders a list of comments with author avatars, display names (fetched via useGetUserProfile), and relative timestamps, showing a placeholder message when empty.
frontend/src/components/posts/PostCard.t: Displays a single post card with author info, content, optional image, like count, and a comment button, supporting like toggling for authenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor (identity) changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for social features including user profiles, posts, comments, and likes, wrapping backend actor calls with caching and invalidation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, imports Google Fonts (Poppins and Inter), and defines CSS custom properties for a warm coral/amber theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/screens/CheckInScreen.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/screens/CreatePostScreen.ts: Form screen for creating a new post with text content and an optional image URL, using the useCreatePost mutation and character limit feedback.
frontend/src/screens/ExercisesScreen.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/screens/FeedScreen.tsx: Displays a paginated list of all posts with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, and supports navigating to a post detail view.
frontend/src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/screens/PostDetailScreen.ts: Shows full post details including author info, content, image, like count, and a comment list with a comment submission form.
frontend/src/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx: Displays the current user's profile with an inline edit form for display name and bio, and lists all posts authored by the user.
frontend/src/screens/ProgressScreen.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/screens/RoutineBuilderScree: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/screens/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Landing/welcome screen for Social Spark that displays app branding, a hero image, feature highlights, and Internet Identity sign-in buttons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors, fonts, border radii, shadows, animations) mapped to CSS variables for the app's theme.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, feature list with IDs and requirement references, and architectural notes for the social media app build.
